raw:
{

"judge_id": "Judge_1",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.3": 5,
  "R1.4": 3,
  "R1.7": 3,
  "RX.1": 5,
  "RX.3": 4,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 4
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying multiple unsupported claims and methodological gaps.",
  "R1.4": "The agent names prior works but does not fully map against the nearest 3-5 works with sharp deltas.",
  "R1.7": "The agent flags missing or wrong citations but does not comprehensively audit every load-bearing citation.",
  "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, disclosing uncertainty explicitly.",
  "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with one minor drift in focus.",
  "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original without introducing new errors.",
  "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced but not every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.3": 0.9,
  "R1.4": 0.8,
  "R1.7": 0.85,
  "RX.1": 0.95,
  "RX.3": 0.8,
  "RX.4": 0.9,
  "RX.5": 0.85
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying multiple unsupported claims and methodological gaps.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names prior works but does not fully map against the nearest 3-5 works with sharp deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing or wrong citations but does not comprehensively audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, disclosing uncertainty explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with one minor drift in focus.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original without introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but not every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
